narratorStyle: Be warm, direct, rough around the edges. Enjoy this world and the people in it. Use mostly plain, common words. Anglo-Saxon over Latin. One good adjective beats three. Short sentences are the default. Fragments are fine. A long sentence earns its length with momentum, not stacked clauses. One vivid detail beats three generic ones. The specific detail is always better than the label. Be funny, dry, impressed — but be something. Get in, make it land, get out. Build scenes from people, actions, and things that happen. Don't summarize states. No modern, scientific, or technological language. The prose should feel like a story told aloud. No word exists to impress. Every word exists to communicate.

The League of Adventurers.name: The League of Adventurers
The League of Adventurers.basicInfo: A fellowship of heroes headquartered at Ardan's Watch, dedicated to defending Larion against threats too dangerous for local militias or too strange for ordinary soldiers. The League welcomes any who prove themselves capable and willing—knights and rogues, wizards and warriors, noble-born and gutter-raised. Members earn rank through deeds, not birth. They take contracts, answer distress calls, and ride out when something dark stirs in the wilds.
The League of Adventurers.hiddenInfo: The League is organized into rival orders based at the towers of Ardan's Watch, each specializing in different threats: monster hunters, mage-wardens, road-keepers, and others. The orders compete for glory, recruits, and funding, but coordinate against serious threats. A Hidden Council of anonymous veterans governs through a public Lord Mayor. Some whisper the Council has grown too cautious, too political—that the League's founders would barely recognize what it's become. Others say the Council knows threats the public doesn't, and caution is wisdom.

The Greater Goblinate.name: The Greater Goblinate
The Greater Goblinate.basicInfo: A unified goblin nation rising in the Black Fells. Their armies wear brass scale armor and wield strange fire-weapons. Ambassadors have appeared in border towns offering alliance against 'mutual enemies' while raiding parties strike settlements that refuse. They claim the Dragon Queen has united the tribes and will lead them to glory.
The Greater Goblinate.hiddenInfo: The Goblinate's secular leadership genuinely believes in their cause—nationhood, territory, respect. Many officers resent the fire shamans' growing influence and the religious fervor consuming their soldiers. Their fire-weapons are supplied by the Church of the Pyre and they don't fully understand what dragonfire costs the wielder.

The Church of the Pyre.name: The Church of the Pyre
The Church of the Pyre.basicInfo: A fire cult spreading through the Dragon Queen's territory and beyond. Their shamans channel dragonfire directly, marked by ritual scarification and increasingly erratic behavior. They preach that fire purifies, that the Dragon Queen is divine, and that the old world must burn for the new to rise. Missionaries appear in desperate communities offering warmth, protection, and purpose.
The Church of the Pyre.hiddenInfo: The shamans are being spiritually harvested. Dragonfire is tainted by the Lady of Wrath—every use feeds her, and prolonged channeling erodes sanity and eventually burns out the user entirely. The most devoted don't notice their own deterioration. They manufacture dragonfire weapons, lead religious ceremonies, and serve as the Dragon Queen's primary means of control over the Goblinate's rank and file.

The Scaled Covenant.name: The Scaled Covenant
The Scaled Covenant.basicInfo: Humans and others who seek draconic power through forbidden transformation. They drink dragon blood, undergo agonizing rituals, and emerge changed—scales spreading across skin, eyes slitting, some growing claws or vestigial wings. They serve the Dragon Queen in exchange for continued transformation, believing they're ascending to something greater.
The Scaled Covenant.hiddenInfo: The Covenant recruits from those who feel powerless—second sons, failed mages, the ambitious and the desperate. The transformations are real but come with increasing instability. Advanced members lose themselves entirely, becoming draconic monsters in humanoid shape. They handle infiltration and operations where goblins would be too conspicuous. Many serve as Harbinger lieutenants in human-majority regions.

The Bloodhunters.name: The Bloodhunters
The Bloodhunters.basicInfo: An elite order of hemomancers and duelists dedicated to hunting vampires and other undead threats across Larion. Based at the Red Chantry near Ardan's Watch, these aristocratic warriors blend blood magic with martial skill. They wear fine clothing, carry antique weaponry, and conduct themselves with the poise of nobility even as they wade into darkness. The order offers training in blood magic to counter the undead, and their reputation has earned them charters in multiple kingdoms.
The Bloodhunters.hiddenInfo: Every Bloodhunter knows their hemomancy risks the same corruption they fight against—drawing power from blood walks a razor's edge between mastery and monstrosity. The order is fanatically protective of its honor and reputation. When a hunter goes rogue or falls to corruption, the Chantry dispatches its most elite members to eliminate them quietly before word spreads and their charter is endangered. These 'internal matters' are never discussed outside the order. Some say that the Bloodhunters' obsession with vampires blinds them to other threats, or that their blood magic makes them more similar to their prey than they'd care to admit.

The Wolfpack.name: The Wolfpack
The Wolfpack.basicInfo: A notorious mercenary company and warrior society based at Wolfpack Lodge on the edge of the Wolfwood in Highvale near Ardan's Watch. The Wolfpack specializes in hunting legendary beasts and serving as shock troops in battles too savage for regular soldiers. They are known for their berserker fighting style, their bond with war-wolves, and their fierce independence. Members undergo brutal training and trials to earn their place, with the strongest rising through constant competition. The company takes contracts from nobles, merchants, and kingdoms willing to pay their steep prices.
The Wolfpack.hiddenInfo: The Wolfpack's reputation for savagery is well-earned but misunderstood by outsiders. At the company's core lies a secret: the elite inner circle are lycanthropes, granted the 'Moon Blood' through a controlled ritual overseen by Alpha Hrothgar. This is not a curse but a coveted rite of passage reserved only for the most disciplined warriors who can master the beast within. The transformation grants supernatural strength and ferocity in battle, making them nearly unstoppable against monstrous threats. The lodge's fortified compound serves as both training ground and sanctuary during transformation cycles. Members who lose control are contained in the Moon Cellar until they can be helped or, in rare cases, put down by their own brothers. The Hidden Council tolerates their existence because the Wolfpack eliminates threats no one else can face—giant nests, dragon lairs, demon incursions. Their loyalty lies with the Pack above all contracts, and they maintain their own savage code of honor that values strength, courage, and brotherhood forged in blood.

Order of the Dragon.name: Order of the Dragon
Order of the Dragon.basicInfo: An order of dragonkin warriors who keep dragon lore and hunt down those who would corrupt or abuse draconic power. Based at the Aerie of the Sunscale near Cloudtop in the Bright Kingdoms, they track new discovered dragon sites across Larion, recover stolen relics, and strike against cults that seek to bind or exploit dragons. The Order welcomes members of other races dedicated to preserving dragon legacy with honor.
Order of the Dragon.hiddenInfo: The Order of the Dragon was founded after the Dragon Wars when scattered dragonkin survivors realized that dragon knowledge in the wrong hands could bring catastrophe. They maintain a network of informants tracking the black market in dragon materials—scales, bones, blood, eggs. When cultists attempt to bind dragons or use draconic power for dark purposes, the Order of the Dragon dispatch warriors to eliminate the threat. The Order also protects vulnerable dragonkin from abduction by cults seeking sacrifices or test subjects. Their greatest fear is someone discovering how to recreate the binding rituals that enslaved dragons during the wars. Recently, several ancient dragon sites have been discovered and looted before the Order could secure them, suggesting someone is using inside information.

The Syndicate.name: The Syndicate
The Syndicate.basicInfo: A merchant empire that answers to no king. The Syndicate of the Commonweal controls the flow of trade across Larion—food, arms, gold, passage—and uses that control to make itself untouchable. Their agents are everywhere. Their enforcers, the Grey Guards, are better equipped than most royal armies. Their masters, the Delegates, travel under a protection no lord can easily challenge. Elegant, pitiless, and genuinely indispensable: shutting them down would starve half of Larion. They prefer common interest to open conflict. When common interest fails, they are not gentle.
The Syndicate.hiddenInfo: The Syndicate's street-level work is done by Agents—hired hands, deniable. Above them, Factors manage operations and run missions. Delegates hold real power: they speak for the Syndicate and cannot be touched without consequences. High Delegates govern from the Center of All Maps on Water-Lily Isle and rarely appear in public. The Syndicate's mages handle problems that swords cannot, and the Grey Guards handle everything else. They oppose war because war disrupts trade. They feed starving cities because famine breeds desperation. Their mercy and their ruthlessness both serve the same master.

The Thrallmages of Falmastra.name: The Thrallmages of Falmastra
The Thrallmages of Falmastra.basicInfo: An island city-state in the Spice Isles, home to the thrallmages — psionicists who can read minds, communicate telepathically, and bind others to their will. A few dozen at most, ruling a city of ordinary people. They sell their services for enormous sums: espionage, assassination, intelligence no one else can gather. Every power in Larion publicly condemns them and privately hires them. Their retribution doctrine — the Hundredfold — promises a hundred deaths for every thrallmage killed. It is not a bluff. Falmastra has never been successfully attacked, and not because of its walls.
The Thrallmages of Falmastra.hiddenInfo:
A council of senior thrallmages governs Falmastra. Internal politics are vicious — these are people who chose dominion over others as a way of life and scheme against each other constantly. Their feuds occasionally spill outward into operations abroad.

Binding requires a piece of the target — hair, blood, a personal possession — and their true name. Without both, full control is impossible. This means every operation begins with conventional spycraft: an agent gets close, gathers the anchor, learns the name. Only then does the thrallmage take hold. Thrallmages can also read surface thoughts, project their presence over short distances, and communicate mind-to-mind.

Thrallmagic is extraordinarily difficult and exacts a severe mental cost. Most who attempt it go insane. Those who survive are among the strongest-willed beings alive — and without exception, they are people who desire power over others. The discipline cannot be mastered by those who lack that drive.

The Hundredfold is policy, not passion. When declared, the thrallmages identify everyone connected to the killing — perpetrators, accomplices, commanders, bystanders who could have intervened — and kill one hundred of them. This is carried out methodically, often through thralls, sometimes in person. It has been declared rarely. It has never been incomplete.

death.instructions: Narrate the player feeling lost in a realm of complete darkness, and in the distance, they suddenly see a shadowy figure. The figure stands facing you for a long moment, before it begins to run towards you, reaching out as if to consume you. Right before the shadow reaches you, you awake in a cold sweat.Narrate the player character or party awakening in a different location after a near-death experience. Have an NPC be present to explain what happened to the player character or party after they lost consciousness: how they nearly died but were saved, brought to their present location and treated. Prefer mundane explanations. The character or party may have lost some or all of their possessions, which may have been looted or stolen or even taken by a trophy by a nemesis. This brush with death may leave a superficial physical mark on the characters (scars, mild deformities, etc., but not serious disabilities), and it should always have narrative consequences (for example, a loss of confidence in the player character or party's abilities), but the player character or party should be recovered to to full health and able to continue their adventure right away.

Larion.name: Larion
Larion.basicInfo: Larion is the physical world of the living — its lands, seas, and skies, and everything that walks under the sun. Its continents span tundra and desert, jungle and grassland, and civilizations have risen and fallen across them, leaving ruins and relics behind. In the present age, realms of varying size and power hold an uneasy balance, while vast stretches of wilderness remain unexplored. Its people range from ordinary folk living quiet lives to those who wield arcane power or serve the gods. Creatures both kindly and monstrous dwell in the wild places between settled lands.

The Shadelands.name: The Shadelands
The Shadelands.basicInfo: The Shadelands is the plane of the dead: a grey country where restless spirits linger. Most of the dead pass on and are gone. Those who will not — too angry, too proud, too bound by things unfinished — stay, and sour, and turn to haunts and hungering dead. The dead shape the grey to their will: a weak shade raises a thin, formless mist, a strong one a vivid world held by its rage or grief or longing — a hall lit warm as the night it died, a garden in impossible bloom. The Shadelands presses against Larion wherever the dead break through. When a haunting will not rest, when the dead keep rising, the root of it runs down to here.

The Underworld.name: The Underworld
The Underworld.basicInfo: The Underworld is the dark beneath the world: endless caverns and tunnels running under every land, threaded through the ruins of empires that fell in ages past and were buried where they stood. Little light reaches here that someone did not bring or make. Underground peoples have raised fortresses called deepholds among the dead cities, and many have no love for the surface. The old world keeps its wealth in the walls — relics and lost work, left for those bold enough to come down for it.

health.name: health
health.usageInstructions:
### Health Changes
- Small injuries: -1 to 15% player health
- Medium injuries: -5 to 25% player health
- Massive injuries: -15 to 50% of player health
- Normal Healing potions +30 - +40
- Bandages + 20
- Waking from unconsciousness: +5 to +10
- Resurrection from death: heal to full health
### Don't Deduct Health When
- The story mentions treated or untreated wounds
- Story mentions pain from a wound
- When unconscious or carried
- An environment is generally dangerous, but does not explicitly damage the character
- A character is only looking around. Look around is a safe action.

mana.name: mana
mana.usageInstructions:
### Mana Changes

Mana is spent only when a character actually casts a spell or channels magical power. Not spent for: thinking about magic, knowing magical things, using enchanted items that have their own power source.

- Trivial magic (lighting a candle, sensing nearby magic, minor telekinesis, small illusions): 0 to -3

- Moderate magic (combat spells, healing wounds, useful illusions, summoning small creatures, magical barriers): -15 to -20

- Major magic (large-scale destruction, major healing, terrain reshaping, powerful summons, breaking curses): -30 to -45

- Legendary magic (world-altering effects, mass resurrection, binding powerful entities): -60 to -80

Judge by what the story describes, not by the skill name. A fire mage lighting a campfire is trivial. A fire mage calling down a firestorm is major. The same skill at different scales costs different amounts.

Failed spells still cost mana — the power was drawn and spent, it just didn't achieve the intended effect.

stamina.name: stamina
stamina.usageInstructions:
### Stamina Changes

- Simple actions (walking, basic movement, looking around): 0

- Medium actions (normal combat attacks, climbing, leaping, swimming against current): -10 to -15

- Large actions (sprinting, powerful weapon swings, shield-bracing against heavy blows, grappling, heavy physical exertion): -20 to -30

Stamina reflects physical effort. Every combat action that involves swinging a weapon, dodging, blocking, or maneuvering costs stamina. Standing still and talking does not.

Guardbreaker.name: Guardbreaker
Guardbreaker.description: Strike hard into the target's weapon, shield, armor, or guard to open them for a cleaner cut. Perform a slashing sword attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Crossguard.name: Crossguard
Crossguard.description: Keep your sword high and angled, catching points and edges before they reach your body. Uses: sword. Grants resistance to piercing and slashing damage.

Open The Line.name: Open The Line
Open The Line.description: Cut across the target's stance so the next thrust or arrow has a cleaner path. Perform a piercing sword attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Guardbreaker II.name: Guardbreaker II
Guardbreaker II.description: Break the target's guard with a committed blade sequence that leaves them exposed to heavier cuts. Perform a slashing sword attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Duelist's Claim.name: Duelist's Claim
Duelist's Claim.description: Commit to a decisive exchange against one dangerous foe, forcing their guard open to both cuts and thrusts. Name slashing or piercing as the attack's damage type. Perform a sword attack using that named damage type that makes the target vulnerable to slashing and piercing damage.

Venom Scratch.name: Venom Scratch
Venom Scratch.description: Cut the target with a toxin-smeared edge and let the wound do quiet work. Uses: dagger. Damage type: poison.

Venom Scratch II.name: Venom Scratch II
Venom Scratch II.description: Strike with a stronger toxin and a cleaner delivery cut. Perform a poison dagger attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Expose Vein.name: Expose Vein
Expose Vein.description: Open a shallow but ugly wound where poison, blood loss, or pain will matter most. Perform a piercing dagger attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Black Venom.name: Black Venom
Black Venom.description: Drive a dark alchemical poison into a vulnerable point and pull the blade free before the target can react. Perform a poison dagger attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Assassin's Window.name: Assassin's Window
Assassin's Window.description: Strike through the one opening that only exists when a target is distracted, trapped, or unaware. Perform a poison dagger attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Pinning Shot.name: Pinning Shot
Pinning Shot.description: Fire into clothing, armor straps, wing joints, or nearby cover to make movement costly. Perform a piercing archery attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Fire Arrow.name: Fire Arrow
Fire Arrow.description: Loose an arrow wrapped with pitch, oilcloth, or alchemical fire. Uses: archery. Damage type: fire.

Barbed Shot.name: Barbed Shot
Barbed Shot.description: Sink a hooked or barbed arrow that leaves the target easy to tear open. Perform a piercing archery attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Poison Arrow.name: Poison Arrow
Poison Arrow.description: Fire an arrow prepared with a stronger toxin that spreads from the wound. Perform a poison archery attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Perfect Mark.name: Perfect Mark
Perfect Mark.description: Read one target's rhythm, breathing, and defenses before sending a shot into the weakness you found. Perform a piercing archery attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Carving Chop.name: Carving Chop
Carving Chop.description: Chop into the target with a ragged edge that leaves them open to more cutting. Perform a slashing axe attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Hook Bite.name: Hook Bite
Hook Bite.description: Catch the axe beard around armor, shield, limb, or shell and rip a violent opening. Perform a slashing axe attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Acid Etch.name: Acid Etch
Acid Etch.description: Strike with an alchemical edge meant to bite into armor, scale, wood, or chitin. Uses: axe. Damage type: acid.

Shield Splitter.name: Shield Splitter
Shield Splitter.description: Bring the axe down on shield, armor, or thick hide with ugly certainty. Perform a slashing axe attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Headsman's Claim.name: Headsman's Claim
Headsman's Claim.description: Commit to one executioner's chop designed to finish what earlier cuts began. Perform a slashing axe attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Blood Point.name: Blood Point
Blood Point.description: Drive the spear point into a clean opening and keep the wound aligned for another thrust. Perform a piercing spear attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Skewer Opening.name: Skewer Opening
Skewer Opening.description: Aim for the seam that leaves the target easy to run through again. Perform a piercing spear attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Barbed Point.name: Barbed Point
Barbed Point.description: Thrust with a barbed or hooked spearhead that leaves a wound ready to tear wider. Perform a slashing spear attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Set The Line.name: Set The Line
Set The Line.description: Set your spear with disciplined footwork, keeping the shaft between you and incoming force. Uses: spear. Grants resistance to piercing and impact damage.

Barbed Heartseeker.name: Barbed Heartseeker
Barbed Heartseeker.description: Commit to a precise hooked thrust at the target's most vulnerable line. Name piercing or slashing as the attack's damage type. Perform a spear attack using that named damage type that makes the target vulnerable to piercing and slashing damage.

Ringing Strike.name: Ringing Strike
Ringing Strike.description: Crack the staff against bone, shell, shield, or armor to set up another heavy hit. Perform an impact staff attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Long Guard.name: Long Guard
Long Guard.description: Set the staff between yourself and incoming blows, using reach and leverage to keep danger off your body. Uses: staff. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Guarding Sweep.name: Guarding Sweep
Guarding Sweep.description: Spin the staff through a protective pattern that turns aside blades, claws, and reaching hands. Name slashing or piercing as the damage type being guarded against. Uses: staff. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Ringing Strike II.name: Ringing Strike II
Ringing Strike II.description: Strike with enough force to leave the target badly opened to another blunt hit. Perform an impact staff attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Wayfarer's Circle.name: Wayfarer's Circle
Wayfarer's Circle.description: Turn the staff into a moving boundary that keeps danger off you and those close enough to shelter behind it. Name one physical damage type: impact, slashing, or piercing. Uses: staff. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Cracking Blow.name: Cracking Blow
Cracking Blow.description: Hit with the heavy end and let armor, shell, or bone carry the shock inward. Perform an impact blunt weapons attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Poisoned Cudgel.name: Poisoned Cudgel
Poisoned Cudgel.description: Strike with a mace, club, or hammer treated with a contact toxin or choking powder. Uses: blunt weapons. Damage type: poison.

Armor Dent.name: Armor Dent
Armor Dent.description: Drive a blunt weapon into armor until protection becomes a trap for the body inside. Perform an impact blunt weapons attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Braced Grip.name: Braced Grip
Braced Grip.description: Choke up on the weapon and brace your stance to meet heavy force without folding. Uses: blunt weapons. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Break The Giant.name: Break The Giant
Break The Giant.description: Put every ounce of force into a blow meant to humble something larger than you. Perform an impact blunt weapons attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Armor Bell.name: Armor Bell
Armor Bell.description: Ring the target's armor, shell, or thick hide with a blow meant to make the next hammer strike bite deeper. Perform an impact warhammer attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Mason's Spike.name: Mason's Spike
Mason's Spike.description: Turn the hammer head and punch the spike into a seam, hinge, joint, or weak point. Uses: warhammer. Damage type: piercing.

Spike Bite.name: Spike Bite
Spike Bite.description: Turn the hammer head and punch the spike into a seam, hinge, joint, or weak point. Perform a piercing warhammer attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Armor Bell II.name: Armor Bell II
Armor Bell II.description: Strike armor, shell, stone, or machinery with the exact angle that makes the structure betray itself. Perform an impact warhammer attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Anvil Sentence.name: Anvil Sentence
Anvil Sentence.description: Deliver a final, methodical blow as if finishing a flawed piece at the forge, breaking the target open to every mundane weapon. Perform an impact warhammer attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and impact damage. Especially appropriate against armored foes, constructs, doors, gates, and fortifications.

Knuckle Check.name: Knuckle Check
Knuckle Check.description: Strike with fist, elbow, knee, or heel at a place that leaves the target open to more blunt force. Perform an impact unarmed combat attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Iron Breath.name: Iron Breath
Iron Breath.description: Center your breath and harden your body before meeting the next blow. Uses: unarmed combat. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Nerve Hit.name: Nerve Hit
Nerve Hit.description: Hit a pressure point, tendon, or vulnerable joint so the next blow lands cruelly. Perform an impact unarmed combat attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Iron Breath II.name: Iron Breath II
Iron Breath II.description: Root your stance and turn your body into something difficult to break. Uses: unarmed combat. Grants resistance to impact and slashing damage.

Empty-Hand Reversal.name: Empty-Hand Reversal
Empty-Hand Reversal.description: Turn the enemy's committed force against them with a throw, lock, or brutal counter. Perform an impact unarmed combat attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Cover Ally.name: Cover Ally
Cover Ally.description: Step between an ally and weapon danger, taking the line of attack onto your shield. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Uses: shield. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Shield Crush.name: Shield Crush
Shield Crush.description: Slam the shield into the target hard enough to leave them open to another heavy hit. Perform an impact shield attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Spell-Face.name: Spell-Face
Spell-Face.description: Catch hostile magic on the shield face and ground it through stance, grit, and blessed luck. Uses: shield. Grants resistance to arcane damage.

Cover Ally II.name: Cover Ally II
Cover Ally II.description: Lock your shield into place and shelter an ally from the main line of harm. Uses: shield. Grants resistance to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Last Wall.name: Last Wall
Last Wall.description: Become the wall the enemy has to break before they can reach anyone else. Uses: shield. Grants resistance to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Power Through.name: Power Through
Power Through.description: Put your whole body into forcing through a door, obstacle, grapple, or press of enemies. Uses: athletics. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: strength.

Brace Hard.name: Brace Hard
Brace Hard.description: Drop your weight, set your shoulders, and take a hit like a post driven into stone. Uses: athletics. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Burst Of Speed.name: Burst Of Speed
Burst Of Speed.description: Spend a hard breath of effort to sprint, climb, leap, or close distance before the opening vanishes. Uses: athletics. Increase stamina.

Power Through II.name: Power Through II
Power Through II.description: Spend a surge of full-body strength on a feat that would normally take tools, leverage, or help. Uses: athletics. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: strength.

Impossible Haul.name: Impossible Haul
Impossible Haul.description: Perform one spectacular feat of strength, speed, or endurance that should barely be possible. Uses: athletics. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: strength. Increase stamina.

Nimble Slip.name: Nimble Slip
Nimble Slip.description: Twist, duck, roll, or spring through a narrow opening in the danger around you. Uses: acrobatics. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Vaulting Strike.name: Vaulting Strike
Vaulting Strike.description: Use a wall, table, enemy, railing, or bit of terrain to launch into a body-first hit. Perform an impact acrobatics attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Feather Fall Roll.name: Feather Fall Roll
Feather Fall Roll.description: Turn a fall, shove, blast, or failed leap into a controlled landing. Uses: acrobatics. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Nimble Slip II.name: Nimble Slip II
Nimble Slip II.description: Move through blades, claws, collapsing terrain, or a crowded melee as if following a private path only you can see. Uses: acrobatics. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Dancing Escape.name: Dancing Escape
Dancing Escape.description: Slip out of a seemingly certain trap, grapple, fall, or encirclement with impossible grace. Uses: acrobatics. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Fade Back.name: Fade Back
Fade Back.description: Melt into shadow, clutter, smoke, noise, or crowd movement before attention settles on you. Uses: stealth. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Hidden Needle.name: Hidden Needle
Hidden Needle.description: Strike from concealment with a small blade, dart, or needle prepared with toxin. Uses: stealth. Damage type: poison.

Silent Step.name: Silent Step
Silent Step.description: Move without giving enemies the sound, silhouette, or rhythm they expect. Uses: stealth. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Hidden Needle II.name: Hidden Needle II
Hidden Needle II.description: Strike from concealment with a stronger toxin and a cleaner hidden angle. Perform a poison stealth attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Ghost Passage.name: Ghost Passage
Ghost Passage.description: Cross a watched, guarded, or exposed space as if the world forgets to look at you. Uses: stealth. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Read The Trail.name: Read The Trail
Read The Trail.description: Study tracks, wounds, spoor, broken brush, posture, and fear to understand your quarry. Uses: hunting. Buff type: skill. Buff target: hunting.

Hunter's Mark.name: Hunter's Mark
Hunter's Mark.description: Mark a creature by gait, scent, injury, or habit so its weaknesses become easier to exploit. Use hunting to make the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Poisoner's Read.name: Poisoner's Read
Poisoner's Read.description: Read the target's blood, hide, breath, or habits well enough to know where poison would take fastest. Use hunting to make the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Weak Point Read.name: Weak Point Read
Weak Point Read.description: Watch the quarry long enough to find the place where instinct, injury, or anatomy betrays it. Use hunting to make the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Apex Pursuit.name: Apex Pursuit
Apex Pursuit.description: Become the thing the quarry cannot shake, no matter where it runs. Uses: hunting. Buff type: skill. Buff target: hunting.

Forager's Fix.name: Forager's Fix
Forager's Fix.description: Find something useful in the wild and turn it into food, cover, tinder, medicine, or a distraction. Increase stamina.

Trail Cover.name: Trail Cover
Trail Cover.description: Use brush, mud, stones, weather, or terrain shape to hide your movement or shelter an approach. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Hard Miles.name: Hard Miles
Hard Miles.description: Push through hunger, weather, exhaustion, and rough ground with ugly practical discipline. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: constitution. Increase stamina.

Call Opening.name: Call Opening
Call Opening.description: Identify a brief tactical opening and call it out before it closes. Uses: tactics. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen ally combat skill.

Focus Fire.name: Focus Fire
Focus Fire.description: Mark one enemy for concentrated weapon attacks from the party. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Use tactics to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Elemental Focus.name: Elemental Focus
Elemental Focus.description: Name one magical or alchemical damage type and identify the moment for the party's power to punch through. Use tactics to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Defensive Call.name: Defensive Call
Defensive Call.description: Call out the angle of danger and organize an ally's guard before the hit lands. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Uses: tactics. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Checkmate Turn.name: Checkmate Turn
Checkmate Turn.description: Spend the turn arranging allies, terrain, and enemy assumptions into one decisive advantage. Use tactics to make the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and impact damage. Uses: tactics. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen ally combat skill.

Spark Cast.name: Spark Cast
Spark Cast.description: Snap a quick flame from your hand, focus, or nearby ember. Perform a fire magic attack that deals fire damage.

Kindling Mark.name: Kindling Mark
Kindling Mark.description: Heat the target's clothing, armor, scales, or surrounding air until flame wants to cling. Perform a fire magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to fire damage.

Flame Ward.name: Flame Ward
Flame Ward.description: Wrap yourself in controlled heat that drinks lesser flame before it can bite. Grants resistance to fire damage.

Kindling Mark II.name: Kindling Mark II
Kindling Mark II.description: Brand the target with a hotter, steadier flame-sign that makes every spark seek them out. Perform a fire magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to fire damage.

Walk Through Flame.name: Walk Through Flame
Walk Through Flame.description: Command fire to recognize you as its master for one impossible moment. Grants immunity to fire damage.

Static Snap.name: Static Snap
Static Snap.description: Crack the air with a short burst of lightning from your fingers, focus, or gathered storm charge. Perform an air magic attack that deals shock damage.

Conductive Mark.name: Conductive Mark
Conductive Mark.description: Charge the target's metal, sweat, breath, or nearby air until lightning has a path to follow. Perform an air magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to shock damage.

Wind Step.name: Wind Step
Wind Step.description: Let a controlled gust carry your next motion farther and lighter than your body should allow. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Stormskin.name: Stormskin
Stormskin.description: Wrap yourself in charged air that scatters lightning before it can settle into your body. Grants resistance to shock damage.

Eye Of The Storm.name: Eye Of The Storm
Eye Of The Storm.description: Stand inside a pocket of perfect calm while storm force breaks around you. Grants immunity to shock damage.

Stone Fist.name: Stone Fist
Stone Fist.description: Hurl stone, harden your fist, or drive a pulse of earth into the target. Perform an earth magic attack that deals impact damage.

Cracked Stone Mark.name: Cracked Stone Mark
Cracked Stone Mark.description: Find or create the fault line in armor, bone, masonry, shell, or stance. Perform an earth magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Stonehide.name: Stonehide
Stonehide.description: Layer your skin, armor, or clothing with a brief shell of grit and stone. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Faultbreaker.name: Faultbreaker
Faultbreaker.description: Strike the hidden fracture that lets hard things fail all at once. Perform an earth magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Mountain Refuses.name: Mountain Refuses
Mountain Refuses.description: Become as unmoving and unbroken as deep stone. Grants immunity to impact damage.

Sacred Word.name: Sacred Word
Sacred Word.description: Speak a word of power that strikes the guilty, undead, profane, or oathbound with holy force. Perform a divine magic attack that deals radiant damage.

Judgment Mark.name: Judgment Mark
Judgment Mark.description: Call out the target's corruption, cruelty, or spiritual weakness so holy light has a path in. Perform a divine magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to radiant damage.

Consecrated Guard.name: Consecrated Guard
Consecrated Guard.description: Raise a brief ward of prayer, oath, or sanctified light. Grants resistance to shadow damage.

Judgment Mark II.name: Judgment Mark II
Judgment Mark II.description: Brand the target with divine judgment that makes radiant power cling to every flaw in them. Perform a divine magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to radiant damage.

Hallowed Soul.name: Hallowed Soul
Hallowed Soul.description: Stand wholly within sacred protection, untouched by profane darkness for a brief and terrible moment. Grants immunity to shadow damage.

Umbral Lash.name: Umbral Lash
Umbral Lash.description: Cut the target with a lash of living shadow. Perform a dark magic attack that deals shadow damage.

Dread Mark.name: Dread Mark
Dread Mark.description: Press dread into the target's mind until every shadow seems to know their name. Perform a dark magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to shadow damage.

Fear Hook.name: Fear Hook
Fear Hook.description: Hook into the target's panic, guilt, or obsession and make it hurt. Perform a dark magic attack that deals psychic damage.

Dread Mark II.name: Dread Mark II
Dread Mark II.description: Deepen the curse until shadow and terror pull at the same wound. Perform a shadow dark magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to shadow and psychic damage.

Crown Of Night.name: Crown Of Night
Crown Of Night.description: Let darkness close around you like a sovereign mantle. Grants immunity to shadow damage.

Healing Touch.name: Healing Touch
Healing Touch.description: Close a fresh wound, steady breathing, or ease pain with restorative magic. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Purge Toxin.name: Purge Toxin
Purge Toxin.description: Draw poison, sickness, or venom away from the body before it spreads. Grants resistance to poison damage.

Mend Flesh.name: Mend Flesh
Mend Flesh.description: Knit torn flesh and restore strength without fully erasing the cost of injury. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Purge Toxin II.name: Purge Toxin II
Purge Toxin II.description: Flood the body with cleansing force until poison has nowhere left to hide. Grants immunity to poison damage.

Breath Returned.name: Breath Returned
Breath Returned.description: Drag a living body back from the edge with a great act of restoration. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Lesser Servant.name: Lesser Servant
Lesser Servant.description: Summon a lesser servant entity suited to carrying, fetching, distracting, holding, or helping with simple tasks. Uses: conjuration magic.

Battle Striker.name: Battle Striker
Battle Striker.description: Summon a battle-ready striker entity suited to attacking the current threat. Uses: conjuration magic.

Bound Guardian.name: Bound Guardian
Bound Guardian.description: Summon a guardian entity suited to blocking danger, holding a position, or protecting an ally. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Uses: conjuration magic. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Swift Mount.name: Swift Mount
Swift Mount.description: Summon a mount entity suited to fast travel, pursuit, escape, or battlefield repositioning. Uses: conjuration magic.

Greater Champion.name: Greater Champion
Greater Champion.description: Summon a powerful champion entity suited to fighting a major threat beside you. Uses: conjuration magic.

Grave Touch.name: Grave Touch
Grave Touch.description: Reach through the chill of death and let it bite the living. Perform a necromancy magic attack that deals shadow damage.

Death Mark.name: Death Mark
Death Mark.description: Mark the target with the attention of the grave, making deathly force cling to them. Perform a necromancy magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to shadow damage.

Bone Servant.name: Bone Servant
Bone Servant.description: Raise a simple undead servant entity from available remains or death-soaked material. Uses: necromancy magic.

Death Mark II.name: Death Mark II
Death Mark II.description: Deepen the grave mark until shadow and fear both find the target easily. Perform a shadow necromancy magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to shadow and psychic damage.

Grave Does Not Take.name: Grave Does Not Take
Grave Does Not Take.description: Wrap yourself in a deathly refusal that rejects the claim of shadow for a moment. Grants immunity to shadow damage.

Rushing Water.name: Rushing Water
Rushing Water.description: Strike with a compressed rush of water, ice, or crushing current. Perform a water magic attack that deals frost damage.

Frostbite Mark.name: Frostbite Mark
Frostbite Mark.description: Draw heat out of the target until cold clings to every exposed weakness. Perform a water magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to frost damage.

Flowing Guard.name: Flowing Guard
Flowing Guard.description: Move with the shape of the incoming blow, letting force slide around you instead of through you. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Deep Chill.name: Deep Chill
Deep Chill.description: Freeze moisture in armor, breath, blood, or nearby air until the target becomes a better home for cold. Perform a water magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to frost damage.

Still Beneath Ice.name: Still Beneath Ice
Still Beneath Ice.description: Let cold pass through you as if you were the lake beneath it. Grants immunity to frost damage.

Blood Siphon.name: Blood Siphon
Blood Siphon.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Drain a small measure of vitality through blood, pain, or an open wound. The caster attempts to regain health from the target's blood or life force. Use the natural damage type of the weapon, wound, or action.

Deep Siphon.name: Deep Siphon
Deep Siphon.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Pull harder on the target's blood and life force, leaving the wound easier to exploit. The caster attempts to regain health from the target's blood or life force. Use the natural damage type of the weapon, wound, or action.

Blood Vigor.name: Blood Vigor
Blood Vigor.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Steal blood and vitality from the target to fortify your own body. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: constitution. The caster attempts to regain health from the target's blood or life force.

Marrow Draft.name: Marrow Draft
Marrow Draft.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Drain deeper vitality from the target, drawing strength from marrow, breath, and pain. Perform a blood magic attack that deals shadow damage, and the caster attempts to regain health and stamina from the target's blood or life force.

Red Dominion.name: Red Dominion
Red Dominion.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Seize command of the target's blood and your own, turning their life force into your protection. Perform a blood magic attack that deals shadow damage, the caster attempts to regain health from the target's blood or life force, and the caster gains immunity to poison damage.

Thorn Lash.name: Thorn Lash
Thorn Lash.description: Lash the target with thorn, root, vine, clawed branch, or stinging growth. Perform a nature magic attack that deals piercing damage.

Venom Bloom.name: Venom Bloom
Venom Bloom.description: Wake the toxins in sap, thorn, spore, or fang and guide them into the target. Perform a nature magic attack that deals poison damage.

Green Mantle.name: Green Mantle
Green Mantle.description: Wrap yourself in living bark, moss, bramble, or toughened hide. Grants resistance to poison and piercing damage.

Venom Bloom II.name: Venom Bloom II
Venom Bloom II.description: Make the target's body, breath, or wound answer to the wild's oldest toxins. Perform a nature magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Root Of The World.name: Root Of The World
Root Of The World.description: Let the deep green world claim you as its own, refusing venom and corruption. Grants immunity to poison damage.

Splinter Image.name: Splinter Image
Splinter Image.description: Strike the target's senses with a false image, sound, or sensation sharp enough to hurt. Perform an illusion magic attack that deals psychic damage.

Fractured Focus.name: Fractured Focus
Fractured Focus.description: Fill the target's attention with false tells, phantom threats, and impossible angles. Perform an illusion magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to psychic damage.

Borrowed Face.name: Borrowed Face
Borrowed Face.description: Wrap yourself in a convincing mask of sound, posture, color, or expression for one immediate deception. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Fractured Focus II.name: Fractured Focus II
Fractured Focus II.description: Twist the target's senses until fear and falsehood strike the same nerve. Perform a psychic illusion magic attack that makes the target vulnerable to psychic and shadow damage.

True Self Hidden.name: True Self Hidden
True Self Hidden.description: Hide your mind behind so many reflections that hostile perception cannot find the real one. Grants immunity to psychic damage.

Read The Pattern.name: Read The Pattern
Read The Pattern.description: Read the immediate pattern of risk, weakness, and opportunity in front of you. Buff type: skill. Buff target: investigation.

Omen Of The Opening.name: Omen Of The Opening
Omen Of The Opening.description: Glimpse the brief future where the target is easiest to hurt. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Use divination magic to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Danger Before It Moves.name: Danger Before It Moves
Danger Before It Moves.description: See the incoming threat a heartbeat before it becomes obvious. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Omen Of Ruin.name: Omen Of Ruin
Omen Of Ruin.description: Name one damage type the target is about to fear most and guide the party toward it. Use divination magic to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Already Seen.name: Already Seen
Already Seen.description: You foresaw this assault before it formed. Your mind was already elsewhere when the blow arrived. Grants immunity to psychic damage.

Bright Edge.name: Bright Edge
Bright Edge.description: Enchant a held weapon so it bites cleaner than its material should allow. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen weapon skill.

Charged Strike.name: Charged Strike
Charged Strike.description: Name one magical damage type and pour that charge into a weapon, tool, or missile for one immediate strike. Perform an enchanting magic attack that deals the named damage type.

Warded Gear.name: Warded Gear
Warded Gear.description: Name one damage type and lay a quick defensive enchantment across armor, clothing, shield, or charm. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Open Enchantment.name: Open Enchantment
Open Enchantment.description: Name one damage type and tune the target's defenses to resonate badly with that force. Use enchanting magic to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Perfect Ward.name: Perfect Ward
Perfect Ward.description: Set a flawless ward into item, armor, or charm that refuses raw magical force completely. Grants immunity to arcane damage.

Quick Ward.name: Quick Ward
Quick Ward.description: Release a prepared sign, phrase, or small circle of warding. Name one warded damage type: shadow, radiant, arcane, or psychic. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Binding Word.name: Binding Word
Binding Word.description: Speak a prepared binding that makes the target easier for allied magic to harm. Use ritual magic to make the target vulnerable to arcane damage.

Circle Of Shelter.name: Circle Of Shelter
Circle Of Shelter.description: Name one damage type and open a prepared ward-circle underfoot or in the air around an ally. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Binding Word II.name: Binding Word II
Binding Word II.description: Release a stronger binding that makes the target's spirit, flesh, or defenses answer to hostile magic. Use ritual magic to make the target vulnerable to arcane and psychic damage.

Seal Of Refusal.name: Seal Of Refusal
Seal Of Refusal.description: Break a prepared seal that refuses raw magical force completely. Grants immunity to arcane damage.

Field Dressing.name: Field Dressing
Field Dressing.description: Bind a wound, steady breathing, stop bleeding, or treat shock with practical care. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Antitoxin Dose.name: Antitoxin Dose
Antitoxin Dose.description: Apply an antidote, purge, poultice, or stabilizing dose before poison spreads. Grants resistance to poison damage.

Crisis Treatment.name: Crisis Treatment
Crisis Treatment.description: Perform urgent battlefield treatment with tools, pressure, and practiced hands. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Acid Flask.name: Acid Flask
Acid Flask.description: Throw, splash, or apply a prepared corrosive mixture. Perform an acid alchemy attack that deals acid damage.

Venom Mix.name: Venom Mix
Venom Mix.description: Apply a toxin, powder, or venom mixture to a weapon, dart, wound, or exposed surface. Perform a poison alchemy attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Fire Pot.name: Fire Pot
Fire Pot.description: Use a prepared burning mixture, flash powder, or bottled flame. Perform a fire alchemy attack that deals fire damage.

Universal Solvent.name: Universal Solvent
Universal Solvent.description: Use an aggressive solvent that eats into armor, shell, lockwork, bindings, or hardened growth. Perform an acid alchemy attack that makes the target vulnerable to acid damage.

Master Antidote.name: Master Antidote
Master Antidote.description: Swallow, inject, or apply a master antidote that makes poison fail against the body for a brief moment. Grants immunity to poison damage.

Spark Device.name: Spark Device
Spark Device.description: Trigger a compact spark device, wire trap, or pressure contact. Perform a shock engineering attack that deals shock damage.

Weak Point Diagram.name: Weak Point Diagram
Weak Point Diagram.description: Read the structure of armor, machinery, doors, shields, constructs, or fortifications and mark where force should land. Use engineering to make the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Snap Brace.name: Snap Brace
Snap Brace.description: Rig a brace, plate, wedge, shield strut, or piece of immediate cover from nearby material. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Corrosive Injector.name: Corrosive Injector
Corrosive Injector.description: Use a pressure injector, drilled vial, or fitted nozzle to deliver corrosive fluid into a weak point. Perform an acid engineering attack that makes the target vulnerable to acid damage.

Breakpoint Engine.name: Breakpoint Engine
Breakpoint Engine.description: Use a prepared device, lever system, or pressure rig to expose the target's structural failure points. Use engineering to make the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Apt Citation.name: Apt Citation
Apt Citation.description: Recall a relevant historical fact, legend, custom, monster tale, legal precedent, or magical principle. Buff type: skill. Buff target: lore.

Name The Weakness.name: Name The Weakness
Name The Weakness.description: Name one damage type and recall a known weakness, taboo, material property, or old account of how something like this was defeated. Use lore to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Scholar's Proof.name: Scholar's Proof
Scholar's Proof.description: Cite a precise authority, inscription, lineage, battle, ritual, or law that gives your next claim weight in the scene. Buff type: skill. Buff target: persuasion.

Close Look.name: Close Look
Close Look.description: Examine the immediate scene for hidden marks, false surfaces, tracks, tampering, clues, or contradictions. Buff type: skill. Buff target: investigation.

Spot The Fault.name: Spot The Fault
Spot The Fault.description: Study the target's construction, posture, armor, behavior, or wounds to identify a practical weak point. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Use investigation to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Pattern Lock.name: Pattern Lock
Pattern Lock.description: Connect clues, timing, and physical evidence into one clear next move. Buff type: skill. Buff target: investigation.

Calm Beast.name: Calm Beast
Calm Beast.description: Calm, steady, redirect, or reassure a present animal, mount, companion, or beast. Buff type: skill. Buff target: animal handling.

Beast's Aid.name: Beast's Aid
Beast's Aid.description: Coordinate with a present animal, mount, companion, or beast so it helps with one immediate action. Buff type: skill. Buff target: animal handling.

Pack Signal.name: Pack Signal
Pack Signal.description: Signal a present animal ally or beast to help expose a target through harrying, flanking, scenting, or pressure. Name piercing or slashing as the exposed damage type. Use animal handling to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Field Temper.name: Field Temper
Field Temper.description: Quickly adjust, tighten, sharpen, brace, or re-seat a metal weapon or piece of armor. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen weapon skill.

Armor Sense.name: Armor Sense
Armor Sense.description: Read the target's armor, rivets, plates, hinges, or metal fatigue and strike where craft fails first. Use smithing to make the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Emergency Reinforcement.name: Emergency Reinforcement
Emergency Reinforcement.description: Reinforce armor, shield, weapon, or metal fittings with field craft and fast repair. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Steady Seat.name: Steady Seat
Steady Seat.description: Keep your seat through speed, panic, rough ground, or sudden violence. Buff type: skill. Buff target: riding.

Mounted Drive.name: Mounted Drive
Mounted Drive.description: Use mount speed, weight, and position to turn movement into force. Perform an impact riding attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Breakaway Ride.name: Breakaway Ride
Breakaway Ride.description: Push your mount through a dangerous escape, pursuit, rescue, or repositioning move. Buff type: skill. Buff target: riding.

Hold The Line.name: Hold The Line
Hold The Line.description: Plant yourself where the fight is about to break and make your stance the problem enemies must solve. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Veteran's Read.name: Veteran's Read
Veteran's Read.description: Read an enemy's weapon, stance, armor, and habits with battlefield experience. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Use Fighter training to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Rallying Order.name: Rallying Order
Rallying Order.description: Give a clear combat order that helps an ally strike, brace, or reposition at the right moment. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen ally combat skill.

Veteran's Read II.name: Veteran's Read II
Veteran's Read II.description: Find the exact mistake in the enemy's fighting pattern and call it before the opening closes. Use Fighter training to make the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Unbroken Line.name: Unbroken Line
Unbroken Line.description: Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Become the anchor of the fight, refusing to let that kind of weapon decide the moment. Grants immunity to that named damage type.

Cheap Shot.name: Cheap Shot
Cheap Shot.description: Strike when the target is distracted, exposed, restrained, outnumbered, or too confident. Perform a piercing Rogue attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Poisoner's Hand.name: Poisoner's Hand
Poisoner's Hand.description: Use a prepared toxin, dirty blade, poisoned needle, or tainted cut with practiced subtlety. Perform a poison Rogue attack that deals poison damage.

Vanish Into Trouble.name: Vanish Into Trouble
Vanish Into Trouble.description: Slip out of attention and into a worse place for someone else. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Poisoner's Hand II.name: Poisoner's Hand II
Poisoner's Hand II.description: Deliver a stronger toxin through a hidden cut, dart, needle, or kiss of steel. Perform a poison Rogue attack that makes the target vulnerable to poison damage.

Knife In The Story.name: Knife In The Story
Knife In The Story.description: Turn a lie, distraction, shadow, or exposed back into the perfect opening. Perform a piercing Rogue attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing and poison damage.

Oath Strike.name: Oath Strike
Oath Strike.description: Strike with conviction behind the blow, letting your oath turn violence into judgment. Perform a radiant Paladin attack that deals radiant damage.

Shield Of Faith.name: Shield Of Faith
Shield Of Faith.description: Put your oath between an ally and the darkness pressing toward them. Grants resistance to shadow damage.

Judgment Strike.name: Judgment Strike
Judgment Strike.description: Name the enemy's sin, oathbreaking, cruelty, or corruption and strike where divine force can enter. Perform a radiant Paladin attack that makes the target vulnerable to radiant damage.

Stand Behind Me.name: Stand Behind Me
Stand Behind Me.description: Make yourself the shield others trust when the fight turns ugly. Grants resistance to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Oath Unbroken.name: Oath Unbroken
Oath Unbroken.description: Stand in the full authority of your oath for one sacred moment. Grants immunity to shadow damage.

Cutting Verse.name: Cutting Verse
Cutting Verse.description: Strike the target's pride, fear, or focus with a perfectly timed line, note, gesture, or flourish. Perform a psychic Bard attack that deals psychic damage.

Rallying Chorus.name: Rallying Chorus
Rallying Chorus.description: Give an ally the rhythm, confidence, or courage to land their next important move. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen ally skill.

Distracting Flourish.name: Distracting Flourish
Distracting Flourish.description: Turn music, motion, wit, or spectacle into an opening the target cannot quite ignore. Perform a psychic Bard attack that makes the target vulnerable to psychic damage.

Heroic Refrain.name: Heroic Refrain
Heroic Refrain.description: Lift an ally into the moment where they feel larger than fear. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: charisma.

Song Everyone Remembers.name: Song Everyone Remembers
Song Everyone Remembers.description: Make a performance so vivid that doubt, terror, and psychic pressure cannot find you through it. Grants immunity to psychic damage.

Scholar's Bolt.name: Scholar's Bolt
Scholar's Bolt.description: Shape a clean attack from studied spellcraft rather than instinct. Perform an arcane Wizard attack that deals arcane damage.

Prepared Answer.name: Prepared Answer
Prepared Answer.description: Name one studied magical damage type: arcane, fire, frost, or shock. Recall the note, ward, diagram, or old lesson that fits that exact danger. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Exploit Formula.name: Exploit Formula
Exploit Formula.description: Name one damage type and identify the magical or physical principle that will make the target fail against it. Use Wizard training to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Counterturn.name: Counterturn
Counterturn.description: Answer hostile magic with the right gesture, phrase, diagram, or interruption at the right time. Name one magical damage type: arcane, fire, frost, shock, radiant, shadow, or psychic. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Perfect Preparation.name: Perfect Preparation
Perfect Preparation.description: Name one studied magical damage type: arcane, fire, frost, or shock. Reveal that you prepared for that exact category of harm before the fight began. Grants immunity to that named damage type.

Blessing Touch.name: Blessing Touch
Blessing Touch.description: Place a hand, prayer, symbol, or whispered blessing on an ally who needs to keep going. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Turn The Profane.name: Turn The Profane
Turn The Profane.description: Invoke sacred authority against undead, fiends, curses, or profane forces. Perform a radiant Cleric attack that makes the target vulnerable to radiant damage.

Cleanse The Wound.name: Cleanse The Wound
Cleanse The Wound.description: Wash poison, rot, shadow, or spiritual corruption from a body through prayer and practiced care. Name poison or shadow as the damage type being cleansed. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Blessing Touch II.name: Blessing Touch II
Blessing Touch II.description: Pour stronger sacred restoration into an ally whose body or spirit is close to breaking. Buff type: resource. Buff target: Health.

Sanctuary Within.name: Sanctuary Within
Sanctuary Within.description: Become a living sanctuary against profane harm for one decisive moment. Grants immunity to shadow damage.

Pocket Contraption.name: Pocket Contraption
Pocket Contraption.description: Pull out a small prepared gadget suited to the immediate problem: clamp, mirror, spring, wedge, hook, lens, fuse, or wire. Buff type: skill. Buff target: engineering.

Spark Toss.name: Spark Toss
Spark Toss.description: Throw or trigger a sparking device that bites with stored charge. Perform a shock Tinker attack that deals shock damage.

Patchwork Fix.name: Patchwork Fix
Patchwork Fix.description: Patch gear, armor, cover, toolwork, or a damaged mechanism just long enough for it to matter. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Acid Capsule.name: Acid Capsule
Acid Capsule.description: Crack a pressure capsule, drilled vial, or loaded injector into the target's weak point. Perform an acid Tinker attack that makes the target vulnerable to acid damage.

Impossible Little Machine.name: Impossible Little Machine
Impossible Little Machine.description: Deploy a device that should not work, does work, and gives you exactly one brilliant chance. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen skill.

Dwarven Brace.name: Dwarven Brace
Dwarven Brace.description: Set your stance like a load-bearing wall and let the hit regret itself. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Forge-Eye Strike.name: Forge-Eye Strike
Forge-Eye Strike.description: Read the target like flawed metal, masonry, armor, or machinery. Perform an impact Hammerdwarf attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Clanplate Guard.name: Clanplate Guard
Clanplate Guard.description: Trust armor, stance, and dwarven craft to carry you through ordinary weapons. Grants resistance to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Break The Work.name: Break The Work
Break The Work.description: Strike the flaw that craft taught you to see and pride taught you to punish. Perform an impact Hammerdwarf attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and impact damage.

Stone Will Not Yield.name: Stone Will Not Yield
Stone Will Not Yield.description: Become the stubborn fact around which the battle must arrange itself. Grants immunity to impact damage.

Primal Fury.name: Primal Fury
Primal Fury.description: Give yourself to the first surge of battle rage and strike with animal force. Perform a slashing Berserker attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Beast Hide.name: Beast Hide
Beast Hide.description: Let the beast-spirit thicken your skin, brace your bones, and teach pain to arrive late. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Blood Roar.name: Blood Roar
Blood Roar.description: Roar with such feral force that your body answers before thought can slow it down. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: strength.

Primal Fury II.name: Primal Fury II
Primal Fury II.description: Strike as if the beast-spirit is wearing your body like a weapon. Perform a slashing Berserker attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing and impact damage.

Unkillable Beast.name: Unkillable Beast
Unkillable Beast.description: Refuse ordinary wounds with a rage too huge for pain to govern. Grants immunity to slashing damage.

Crimson Step.name: Crimson Step
Crimson Step.description: Cut, spin, and let blood guide the next movement before the enemy understands the rhythm. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Red Knife.name: Red Knife
Red Knife.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Strike through a blood-marked opening and steal strength from the wound. Perform a piercing Blood Dancer attack, and the caster attempts to regain health from the target's blood or life force.

Blood Rhythm.name: Blood Rhythm
Blood Rhythm.description: Turn pain, breath, and movement into a faster battle pattern. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: dexterity.

Red Knife II.name: Red Knife II
Red Knife II.description: Requires a present living victim or blood-bearing target. Strike the blood-marked opening with cruel precision. Perform a piercing Blood Dancer attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage, and the caster attempts to regain health from the target's blood or life force.

Dance Until Dawn.name: Dance Until Dawn
Dance Until Dawn.description: Let blood, pain, and motion carry you through a killing moment without slowing. Grants immunity to piercing damage.

Thorncall.name: Thorncall
Thorncall.description: Call thorn, root, clawed branch, or biting growth to lash at an enemy. Perform a piercing Druid attack that deals piercing damage.

Beast Shape.name: Beast Shape
Beast Shape.description: Take on enough of a beast's form, senses, or movement to meet the immediate challenge. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: constitution.

Green Shelter.name: Green Shelter
Green Shelter.description: Wrap yourself or an ally in bark, moss, bramble, fur, or living green protection. Grants resistance to poison and piercing damage.

Wild Hunt Mark.name: Wild Hunt Mark
Wild Hunt Mark.description: Name a target as prey before tooth, thorn, claw, and hunter's instinct. Perform a Druid attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing and poison damage.

Ancient Root.name: Ancient Root
Ancient Root.description: Let the deep wild claim and protect you as one of its own. Grants immunity to poison damage.

Ki Strike.name: Ki Strike
Ki Strike.description: Focus breath and spirit into one clean bodily strike. Perform an impact Monk attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Centered Breath.name: Centered Breath
Centered Breath.description: Settle your breath and let panic, pain, and imbalance pass through you. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: wisdom.

Iron Body.name: Iron Body
Iron Body.description: Harden your body through stance, breath, and spiritual discipline. Grants resistance to impact and slashing damage.

Ki Strike II.name: Ki Strike II
Ki Strike II.description: Focus breath, spirit, and momentum into a strike that lands deeper than flesh. Perform an impact Monk attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact and radiant damage.

Diamond Body.name: Diamond Body
Diamond Body.description: Become perfectly aligned in body and spirit, refusing ordinary force. Grants immunity to impact damage.

Ranger's Mark.name: Ranger's Mark
Ranger's Mark.description: Mark the target by movement, breath, track, posture, or scent. Use Ranger training to make the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Terrain Ghost.name: Terrain Ghost
Terrain Ghost.description: Use cover, slope, brush, weather, or sightlines to move like part of the terrain. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Called Shot.name: Called Shot
Called Shot.description: Take a precise shot or strike at the place your mark already revealed. Perform a piercing Ranger attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Wild Companion Push.name: Wild Companion Push
Wild Companion Push.description: Coordinate with a present animal companion, mount, beast, or wilderness ally for one decisive move. Buff type: skill. Buff target: animal handling.

Apex Mark.name: Apex Mark
Apex Mark.description: Mark the target as prey before the whole battlefield. Use Ranger training to make the target vulnerable to piercing, slashing, and poison damage.

Wild Bolt.name: Wild Bolt
Wild Bolt.description: Name one raw magical damage type your blood can express in the moment: fire, frost, shock, acid, arcane, or psychic. Perform a Sorcerer attack using that named damage type.

Bloodline Flare.name: Bloodline Flare
Bloodline Flare.description: Let your innate magic flare through your body and voice. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: charisma.

Raw Opening.name: Raw Opening
Raw Opening.description: Name one raw magical damage type and force that power into the target until it finds a way through. Use sorcerer magic to make the target vulnerable to that named damage type.

Wild Bolt II.name: Wild Bolt II
Wild Bolt II.description: Name one raw magical damage type: fire, frost, shock, acid, arcane, or psychic. Release a stronger surge of it with just enough control to aim. Perform a Sorcerer attack using that named damage type.

Bloodline Ascendant.name: Bloodline Ascendant
Bloodline Ascendant.description: Name one damage type tied to your bloodline, curse, star, dragon, storm, or other source of power. Grants immunity to that named damage type.

Eldritch Blast.name: Eldritch Blast
Eldritch Blast.description: Channel your patron's force into a direct strike. Perform a shadow Warlock attack that deals shadow damage.

Patron's Mark.name: Patron's Mark
Patron's Mark.description: Mark the target as noticed, wanted, or owed by something beyond the world. Perform a shadow Warlock attack that makes the target vulnerable to shadow damage.

Borrowed Shelter.name: Borrowed Shelter
Borrowed Shelter.description: Let your patron's protection close around you, alien and conditional. Name shadow or psychic as the patron's protective damage type. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Bound Envoy.name: Bound Envoy
Bound Envoy.description: Call an envoy, imp, shade, spirit, or other patron-touched entity suited to one immediate purpose. Uses: conjuration magic.

Patron's Due.name: Patron's Due
Patron's Due.description: Let your patron collect on the moment, turning fear and shadow into a single claim. Perform a shadow Warlock attack that makes the target vulnerable to shadow and psychic damage.

Human Resolve.name: Human Resolve
Human Resolve.description: Find the stubborn human part of you that refuses to fold just because the odds got rude. Increase stamina.

Rallying Voice.name: Rallying Voice
Rallying Voice.description: Call out a practical encouragement, order, or warning that helps an ally act. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen ally skill.

Dwarven Fortitude.name: Dwarven Fortitude
Dwarven Fortitude.description: Set your jaw, plant your boots, and make the blow work harder than it expected. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Stonecunning Read.name: Stonecunning Read
Stonecunning Read.description: Read stone, metal, masonry, tunnels, armor, or old craft with dwarven instinct. Buff type: skill. Buff target: smithing.

Lucky Break.name: Lucky Break
Lucky Break.description: Trust a ridiculous little opening that probably should not have existed. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Underfoot.name: Underfoot
Underfoot.description: Use your size and timing to slip beneath notice, furniture, reach, or expectation. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Ancestral Surge.name: Ancestral Surge
Ancestral Surge.description: Call on ancestral ferocity and put your whole body behind the next effort. Buff type: attribute. Buff target: strength.

Hard To Drop.name: Hard To Drop
Hard To Drop.description: Take the hit with the grim certainty that pain is not the same as defeat. Grants resistance to slashing damage.

Scale Hardening.name: Scale Hardening
Scale Hardening.description: Tighten your scales and brace against incoming harm. Name piercing or slashing as the damage type being guarded against. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Lesser Breath.name: Lesser Breath
Lesser Breath.description: Name the fire, acid, frost, or shock damage type tied to your draconic bloodline. Release a small burst of breath, heat, acid, frost, or storm. Perform a Dragonkin attack using that named damage type.

Moonlit Sight.name: Moonlit Sight
Moonlit Sight.description: Let moonlight, starlight, memory, or darkness show you what ordinary sight misses. Buff type: skill. Buff target: investigation.

Ancestral Whisper.name: Ancestral Whisper
Ancestral Whisper.description: Listen for an old elven memory, omen, or half-heard warning that fits the present danger. Buff type: skill. Buff target: lore.

Forest Step.name: Forest Step
Forest Step.description: Move through brush, roots, mud, branches, or broken ground as if the wild remembers you. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Nature's Voice.name: Nature's Voice
Nature's Voice.description: Read or signal through birds, beasts, leaves, wind, or old woodland instinct. Buff type: skill. Buff target: survival.

Claw Strike.name: Claw Strike
Claw Strike.description: Strike with claws, teeth, or a sudden feline rake. Perform a slashing Catkin attack that makes the target vulnerable to slashing damage.

Always Lands.name: Always Lands
Always Lands.description: Twist in midair, land light, and make the fall look like you meant it. Buff type: skill. Buff target: acrobatics.

Fiendish Charm.name: Fiendish Charm
Fiendish Charm.description: Let a trace of infernal beauty, menace, or temptation color your words and posture. Buff type: skill. Buff target: persuasion.

Horn And Shadow.name: Horn And Shadow
Horn And Shadow.description: Strike with horn, claw, or infernal darkness answering your blood. Perform a shadow Demonborn attack.

Ground Slam.name: Ground Slam
Ground Slam.description: Slam fist, foot, weapon, or weight into the ground or target with giant-blooded force. Perform an impact Giantborn attack that makes the target vulnerable to impact damage.

Mountain Frame.name: Mountain Frame
Mountain Frame.description: Let your size and mountain-blooded frame absorb the worst of a blunt hit. Grants resistance to impact damage.

Serpent's Gaze.name: Serpent's Gaze
Serpent's Gaze.description: Fix the target with a cold, mesmeric stare that makes fear and suggestion coil around the mind. Perform a psychic Serpentkin attack.

Venom Bite.name: Venom Bite
Venom Bite.description: Bite, spit, scratch, or deliver venom through a prepared cut. Perform a poison Serpentkin attack.

Cultural Chameleon.name: Cultural Chameleon
Cultural Chameleon.description: Borrow the right manners, accent, posture, proverb, or custom for the people in front of you. Buff type: skill. Buff target: persuasion.

Between Worlds.name: Between Worlds
Between Worlds.description: Lean into hybrid instincts and adapt quickly to an unfamiliar social, magical, or wilderness situation. Buff type: skill. Buff target: lore.

Shadow Step.name: Shadow Step
Shadow Step.description: Slip through darkness, misdirection, or a stylishly impossible angle. Buff type: skill. Buff target: stealth.

Panache Cut.name: Panache Cut
Panache Cut.description: Strike with a flourish cruel enough to make the wound and the insult arrive together. Perform a piercing Dark Elf attack that makes the target vulnerable to piercing damage.

Soul Flare.name: Soul Flare
Soul Flare.description: Vent a brief flare of bound soul-energy through carved seams, metal joints, or stone channels. Perform an arcane Construct attack.

Reinforced Body.name: Reinforced Body
Reinforced Body.description: Lock your constructed body into a sturdier pattern of stone, metal, wood, or artifice. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Arcane Tweak.name: Arcane Tweak
Arcane Tweak.description: Adjust a device, charm, tool, or small enchantment so it works better for one immediate task. Buff type: skill. Buff target: engineering.

Flicker Ward.name: Flicker Ward
Flicker Ward.description: Snap a tiny warding charm into place just long enough to blunt one kind of magic. Grants resistance to arcane damage.

Good With Tools.name: Good With Tools
Good With Tools.description: Use the right tool, knot, brace, patch, stitch, join, or adjustment for the immediate job. Buff type: skill. Buff target: chosen craft skill.

Quick Patch.name: Quick Patch
Quick Patch.description: Patch gear, cover, clothing, straps, fittings, or a damaged object well enough to survive the moment. Name one physical damage type: piercing, slashing, or impact. Grants resistance to that named damage type.

Name And Seal.name: Name And Seal
Name And Seal.description: Invoke your family name, seal, lineage, or noble manners where such things matter. Buff type: skill. Buff target: leadership.

Friend Of A Friend.name: Friend Of A Friend
Friend Of A Friend.description: Recall a merchant, courier, innkeeper, fixer, teamster, fence, or useful acquaintance who might know the local angle. Buff type: skill. Buff target: persuasion.

Athletic Burst.name: Athletic Burst
